description: Product Description Wisdom Smokers Mouthwash 500ml Ingredients Aqua, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glycerin, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Benzoate, Aroma, Limonene, Sodium Fluoride, Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Sodium Saccharin, Menthol, Citric Acid, CI 42090, Contains: Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/w (225 ppm F) Directions Use 20 ml, rinse your mouth for 30 seconds, then spit. Safety Warning Do not swallow Box Contains 3 x Wisdom Smokers Alcohol Free Antibacterial Mouthwash 500 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Wisdom Toothbrushes Ltd., Haverhill, England, CB9 8DT. RP. MSL, STE 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
